title: YTP: Mario and Luigi FIGHT!
description:
Mario is playing his heavy metal music too loud so Luigi gets P.O.ed and throws it in the fireplace then they fight, but Mario dies in an attempted kidnapping and is turned into a zombie!!!
After a dramatic scene, Mario is turned back to normal but displays strange homosexual behavior.

This is the longest poop I've made yet. Quite a bit of music in this one. Here are the songs.

1.) What's Up People? by Maximum the Hormone (The screamo song Mario is listening to.)

2.) Viva Forever by the Spice Girls (The song that Luigi randomly starts singing when he's leaving.)

3.) My Heart Will Go On by Celine Dion (When it goes black and white and Luigi's in the frogsuit.)

MARIO LIKES JAPANESE HEAVY METAL!!! XDDDDD! YEAH ROCK ON MARIO!!!!!!
